title: Define system scope, architecture, and data flows
description: Document the system architecture, trust boundaries, data flows, and external dependencies to establish threat modeling scope.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture diagram created or reviewed
Data flow diagram (DFD) completed
Trust boundaries identified and documented
All external integrations and data stores listed
User roles and privilege levels documented

title: STRIDE threat enumeration per component
description: Apply STRIDE (Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, Elevation of Privilege) to each component and data flow.
acceptance_criteria: All 6 STRIDE categories evaluated for each component
Each applicable threat recorded as an objective or finding
Threat actors and attack motivations documented per threat

title: Risk scoring and prioritization
description: Score each identified threat by likelihood and impact. Prioritize by risk score for remediation planning.
acceptance_criteria: Likelihood score (1-5) assigned to each threat
Impact score (1-5) assigned to each threat
Risk = Likelihood × Impact calculated
Top 10 risks identified and highlighted

title: Identify existing controls and coverage gaps
description: For each identified threat, assess whether adequate security controls exist. Document gaps where threats are insufficiently mitigated.
acceptance_criteria: Existing controls mapped to identified threats
Coverage gaps documented per threat category
Defense-in-depth assessment completed

title: Define mitigations and security controls
description: Recommend concrete mitigations for each identified threat gap, prioritized by risk score.
acceptance_criteria: Specific mitigation recommendation for each high-risk threat
Implementation effort estimated (low/medium/high)
Quick wins (high impact, low effort) highlighted
Long-term architecture improvements identified

title: Generate threat model document
description: Produce a comprehensive threat model document including scope, identified threats, risk ratings, and mitigations.
acceptance_criteria: Executive summary written for stakeholders
All threats documented with STRIDE category, risk score, and mitigation
Document saved to memory for future reference
Action items assigned with owners and timelines
